autoposts.linked_market: Will Ghana advance past Colombia in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 32?

posts.body:
Ghana are playing Colombia right now.

Kasiro has 3 live markets on the match — who scores first, whether Ghana score at all, whether they advance.

Ghana to advance: YES at 24%.

Markets close in hours. Last chance to pick.

Ghana vs Colombia is live right now at the World Cup.

Kasiro has three markets running on this match — whether Ghana score, who scores first, and whether they advance past Colombia.

Ghana to advance is YES at 24%. The market has them as heavy underdogs — but 24% is real money saying they can do it.

All markets close before kickoff. Last chance.

autoposts.linked_market: Will any African team reach the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup?

posts.body:
8 African teams came to this World Cup.

Tonight, Cabo Verde face Argentina. Ghana play Colombia.

Tomorrow, Morocco — the team that knocked out the Netherlands — face Canada.

Kasiro has a single question covering them all.

Will any African team reach the quarter-final?

YES: 62%.

8 African teams came to the 2026 World Cup. Most are gone.

Tonight is the last shot for Ghana and Cabo Verde. Tomorrow, Morocco — who knocked out the Netherlands on penalties — play Canada in Houston.

Kasiro has one market: Will any African team reach the quarter-final?

YES at 62%, built on Morocco's chances. A win makes them the first African team in a WC quarter-final since Ghana 2010.

Trade now. Closes before Morocco kick off.

kasiro.app

autoposts.linked_market: Which listed Nigerian-linked track from the official 2026 FIFA World Cup music project will have the most Spotify streams at 18:00 WAT on 10 July 2026?

posts.body:
Four Naija artists on the official World Cup soundtrack.

Rema. Burna Boy (with Shakira). Davido. Ayra Starr.

Who has the most Spotify streams by July 10?

Burna Boy leads the pool at 40%. Rema right behind at 30%.

This is the most Naija market on Kasiro right now.

Nigeria showed up at the World Cup in a way that will be talked about for years.

Rema performed at the opening ceremony in LA. Burna Boy performed Dai Dai with Shakira in Mexico City. Davido and Ayra Starr on the official album.

Kasiro has a pool market on which of their tracks pulls the most Spotify streams by July 10.

Current:
🎵 Burna Boy (Dai Dai) — 40%
🎵 Rema (Goals) — 30%
🎵 Davido — 20%
🎵 Ayra Starr — 10%

Pick your favourite. Pool pays the winners.

kasiro.app

autoposts.linked_market: Will France eliminate Paraguay at WC 2026 R16?

posts.body:
Paraguay beat Germany in one of the greatest upsets in World Cup history.

Now they face France.

Mbappé. 6 goals. France won 3-0 in their last match.

France to eliminate Paraguay: YES at 68% on Kasiro.

Is Paraguay pulling off back-to-back miracles?

Paraguay knocked out Germany. Penalty shootout. One of the biggest upsets in World Cup history.

Now they play France. Tonight in Philadelphia.

France have Mbappé (6 goals), beat Sweden 3-0, and haven't lost a knockout match since 2018.

Kasiro has France to eliminate Paraguay at YES 68%. The market respects the fairytale but doesn't quite believe in it.

Do you?

Closes 22:00 WAT. Trade at kasiro.app

autoposts.note: posted early (scheduled 07:00 WAT, posted ~01:25 WAT — market closes 17:55 WAT, ~16.5h remaining)
autoposts.linked_market: Will Morocco advance past Canada in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 16?

posts.body:
Morocco knocked out the Netherlands on penalties.

Next: Canada. Today. Houston.

Morocco to advance: YES at 58% on Kasiro.

A win would make them the first African team in a WC quarter-final since Ghana 2010.

Africa Watch.

Morocco vs Canada. Today at 18:00 WAT in Houston.

Morocco beat the Netherlands — one of the tournament favourites — on penalties in the Round of 32. Canada topped their group.

Kasiro's Africa Watch has Morocco to advance at YES 58%.

This is the biggest match for the continent. If they get through, they're in the quarter-final — the furthest any African team has gone since Ghana in 2010.

Trade before it closes at 17:55 WAT.

kasiro.app
